response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
If a tool result is ambiguous, report the ambiguity without selecting a record.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call health-admin_get, health-admin_availability, and health-admin_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the clinic scheduling review, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve hea-255; check whether "Vision Examination" is available on 2026-10-20 in Cedar Clinic; and list active appointments in Cedar Clinic. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. If any tool result is ambiguous, flag that result rather than choosing a record.
